extraction_reasoning: The litigation table reports 9 criminal proceedings by the Company and none against the Company; it reports 4 tax proceedings against the Company, with no tax proceedings against the Subsidiary, and no statutory/regulatory proceedings against the Company, Subsidiary, Promoters, Directors, KMPs or SMPs. I counted only the Against Company and Against Subsidiary rows, excluding all By Company, By Directors, By Promoters, By Subsidiary and By KMP/SMP rows; the quantified group amount against the Company is ₹47.55 million and against the Subsidiary is Nil, totaling ₹47.55 million, or ₹4.755 crore. The contingent-liabilities figure is the stated consolidated Total of ₹314.84 million as at March 31, 2026, converted to ₹31.484 crore rather than summed from line items. Company-wide customer concentration for the latest full fiscal year, Fiscal 2026, is stated as a percentage of revenue from operations: top five customers 32.86% and top ten customers 40.87%; the source tables use ₹ million, converted to crore by dividing by 10.
